summary: PR1.11 deploy-polish: dedupe stations 6→4 (derive purely from PROJECT_SHOWCASE_ENTRIES; map dialogue rich-body onto matching ids), delete legacy desk+rack+crates+product cubes, delete dead -z wall shelf, anchor hero (emissive 0.9→1.6) over station screens (1.6→1.0), restore cool key light (#ffd9b0→#e6ecf2), bump foot-kick clearance to 3.5cm, lift rug borders 1cm, gate reduced-motion via MQ change event. data/productRoom.ts untouched. Build green.
